case_title: LINDA SNOWBERGER VS. GARY JEFFREY ET AL

docket_entries.description: JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 210056905) DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF SNOWBERGER, LINDA

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-18-2025 - REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-18-2025 - LAURA STRAZZO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF LINDA SNOWBERGER. HECTOR CHINCHILLA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS GARY JEFFREY AND YOLANDA LEW. THE COURT ISSUED SANCTIONS[***SEE BELOW***]AS TO BOTH COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. THE COURT ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE CHRISTOPHER C. HITE IN DEPT. 318 FORTHWITH. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, COUNSEL WILL REPORT BACK TO DEPT. 206 FOR TRIAL ASSIGNMENT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE C. EAST; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206) ***[AFTER SESSION, DEPT. 318 REPORTED THAT THE CASE HAS SETTLED WITH JUDGE HITE AT THE MSC. THEREAFTER, JUDGE EAST VACATED THE SANCTIONS ISSUED ABOVE AS TO BOTH COUNSEL. TRIAL DATE IS OFF CALENDAR, CASE NOW SETTLED.]***
